pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 13-37; RASTER_FILE variable set to this path
Confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 41-82; VECTOR_FILE variable set to this path
Confirmed in export_result.sh line 7; OUTPUT_PATH variable set to this path

Task description (task.json) requires 'Output column prefix: elevation', but verifier script (export_result.sh lines 88-95) accepts ANY numeric field, not specifically 'elevation'. Verifier uses heuristic to find first numeric field regardless of name.

URL returns HTTP 404 (verified with curl -I). setup_task.sh attempts download but URL is broken, so always falls back to synthetic generation (lines 21-35). Generates 100x100 gradient GeoTIFF with EPSG:4326 projection.

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic - 15 random points within raster spatial extent
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 43-82 generates synthetic monitoring well points. Random coordinates generated within raster bounds with properties: id (1-15) and well_name (MW-001 to MW-015).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on entirely synthetic data. The raster file is generated as a 100x100 gradient GeoTIFF with EPSG:4326 projection (a fallback after failed download from QGIS sample data). The vector layer contains 15 synthetic monitoring well points with random coordinates within the raster bounds. File paths are correctly specified in task and export scripts. The task requires elevation field to be named with 'elevation' prefix per description, but the verifier script accepts any numeric field name without enforcing the specific field name.
